scripts.build: npm run build -w @better-chord/voicings && npm run build -w @better-chord/react
scripts.test: npm run test -w @better-chord/voicings && npm run test -w @better-chord/react
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run -w @better-chord/voicings && npm run test:run -w @better-chord/react
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @better-chord/voicings && npm run lint -w @better-chord/react
